iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 26% (stable). Day 21 13:05 UTC - Leadership decapitation (Larijani + Soleimani killed). Mojtaba has not appeared publicly. Nuclear threshold: none. 60% HEU under monitoring. Natanz destroyed Mar 2. Path narrowing but no weapons-grade enrichment. Stable.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 21 13:05 UTC - Day 18 of Iran war. Europe flatly rejects Trump Hormuz coalition (NYT: 'hell no'). Trump delays China visit. Larijani + Soleimani killed overnight. Oil $100-106/bbl, Gulf exports down 60%. Kharg Island struck, Iran threatens Ford carrier. No de-escalation signals. Stable at ceiling.

top_signals: Israel confirms killing Ali Larijani (Iran security chief) + Basij cmdr Soleimani
Iran fires missiles at Israeli troops on Lebanon border — first direct strike in Lebanon theater
Israel strikes Tehran again overnight — new wave
Katz: displaced Lebanese wont return south of Litani — prolonged occupation
HMS Dragon deployed to Mediterranean, heading to eastern Med
Trump warns NATO faces very bad future if allies refuse Hormuz help
Starmer refuses to send UK warships — wont get dragged into wider war
India-Iran Hormuz deal: 2 ships pass in tanker exchange
Peace talks fizzling — Trump attention on Iran, Kremlin dismisses FT report
Pakistan-Afghanistan fighting continues, China mediating, ceasefire not holding

new: china: china_reduced_flights removed (was -3, flights now normal)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 20 08:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all primary theaters. Iran conventional: Kharg Island oil hub struck by US jets, Iran threatens Ford carrier group. Israel-Lebanon: simultaneous strikes on Tehran + Beirut, ground ops continue. No ceasefire in ANY theater. Only minor signal: UAE reopens airspace. Oil exports down 60%.

latest_news.headline: Europe flatly rejects Trump's Hormuz coalition demands
latest_news.text: European leaders resist Trump's bellicose demands for warships. Axios: responses range from skepticism to 'hell no'. UK circulating plan but no commitments.

latest_news.headline: Trump delays China visit due to Middle East conflict
latest_news.text: Trump says 'I think it's important that I be here' — asks China to reschedule summit. Diplomatic engagement but driven by crisis, not de-escalation.

latest_news.headline: Oil steadies around $100/bbl, down from spike but still +40% since war began
latest_news.text: Brent ~$100-106/bbl. WTI $93.50. Both up ~40% since Feb 28 attacks. Some ships transiting Hormuz, easing slightly from peak.

latest_news.headline: Kharg Island oil hub struck by US jets, Iran threatens Ford carrier group
latest_news.text: US strikes hit Kharg Island oil hub. IRGC threatens Ford carrier group with 'imminent attack'.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21 13:05 UTC) — Day 18 of Iran war. Europe rejects Hormuz coalition. Trump delays China visit. Leadership decapitation ongoing. Oil $100-106/bbl, Gulf exports down 60%. Israel-Lebanon: ground ops expanding. Pakistan-Afghanistan: ceasefire collapsed, China mediating. No de-escalation in any theater.
